verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: This indicates the persecution against the Church set on foot by the nations who still continue in unbelief.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: But he (Samson) who suffered those things, trusted that there would be a retaliation against those waging this war.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: First of all, by his betaking himself to the Rock not cognizable to the senses; secondly, by the finding of the jaw-bone of an ass.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: Now the type of the jaw-bone is the body of Christ.
